facebook.caption: Sometimes the best finds in Phu Quoc are the quietest ones. Ola coffee shop, tucked along 66 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Khu 1, earns its 4.5/5 rating with 86 reviews for good reason. Whether you need a slow morning coffee before hitting the beaches or a cool midday escape from the heat, this spot delivers a relaxed, local café atmosphere that many busy tourist areas lack. Practical tip: it sits right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, one of the island's main strips, so it's easy to fold into any day of exploring.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the cups arrive, the light filters in, and the pace slows right down. Ola coffee shop on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is exactly the kind of place you wander into once and end up staying far longer than planned. A 4.5/5 rating backed by 86 reviews says it all.

instagram.caption: Your slow-morning headquarters in Phu Quoc. Ola coffee shop on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo holds a solid 4.5/5 from 86 reviews and feels like a genuine local retreat. Drop in early before the island wakes up.
instagram.video_caption: Sip. Exhale. Repeat. Ola coffee shop on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the low-key café break your Phu Quoc itinerary actually needs. Rated 4.5/5 by 86 happy visitors.
